name: Fast & Furious Trans
notes: Only IL SAFER match is FAST & FURIOUS TRANSPORTATION INC in Orland Hills (USDOT 4484526), not Mount Prospect. Different city/address from source (1715 W Pheasant Trl, Mount Prospect 60056 is a residential SFH built 1968). MCS-150 dated 04/29/2026 - very recent registration; possibly a different operator with similar name. No IL SOS data retrievable (ILSOS/Bizapedia/OpenCorporates all CAPTCHA-blocked). Authorized only for Property freight, not passenger - unlikely to be a school-bus operator.

name: H & L Passenger Svc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER records for 'H & L Passenger' in any state. Operates as H & L PASSENGER SERVICES, INC., NPI 1538558739, taxonomy 343900000X (Non-emergency Medical Transport / VAN) - intrastate Medicaid NEMT provider, no interstate authority required. Source company address 3939 S Lake Park Ave, Chicago 60653 is consistent with NPI listing. IL SOS direct lookup blocked (CAPTCHA). Likely small NEMT van operator, not a school-bus operator.

name: Hispa Transport
notes: No FMCSA SAFER records for 'Hispa Transport' in Illinois (full *HISPA* keyword search returned 59 non-IL results, none matching). Source address 4625 W Lawrence Ave # U406, Chicago 60630 is a Latino/Hispanic-business suite address. No IL SOS, City of Chicago BACP, or NPI registry hit. Likely a very small intrastate operator or DBA. Listed as IL school/student-transport candidate but no public footprint discovered.

name: Hope Medivan Inc

Address 9229 S Thomas Ave, Bridgeview, IL 60455 matches source. Phone 708-430-3922. Founded ~2007 per D&B. IL SOS direct lookup blocked (CAPTCHA). Medicaid NEMT van operator, not school-bus.
